name: vedyx-indexer
description: The Graph indexer for Vedyx Protocol - tracks voting, staking, and address verdicts

scripts.build:unichain-testnet: npm run prepare:unichain-testnet && npm run codegen && npm run build
scripts.build:mainnet: npm run prepare:mainnet && npm run codegen && npm run build
scripts.deploy:unichain-testnet: npm run build:unichain-testnet && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npm run build:mainnet && npm run deploy

author: Vedyx Team
